ops.text: PHASE C DONE @ 6027687ae249 (pushed main; Guides CI success 7s, codex CI success — watch resumed manually after a transient gh/api 503 during ship's watch). The implementer workflow (wf_4fc6e0c6-0a0) stalled after finishing the work — attempt 1 died mid-golangci-polish, 5 retries produced zero tokens (infra hang) — so reconciliation ran from the disk record: I finished the 2 pending nolint annotations, verified all gates myself, and read the full diff. Verify lanes ran as direct parallel opus agents (workflow stall machinery bypassed): reuse/dead-code audit CLEAN (deadcode empty, golangci 0, directWake matches cc-interact's own reference pattern, no enqueue helper exists to reuse; minors accepted: raw-SQL test read — no non-mutating accessor exists; envWithoutGOROOT test-only) and correctness review NO blockers/majors with 3 minors: M1 FIXED (unroutable --owner — session and claude-pid both empty — used to enqueue nothing silently via Reply{OK:true}; now refuses at dispatch exit 2 before minting), M2 FIXED (added TestOwnerWakeFallsBackToClaudePID: seeded claude_pid=4242 + rotated session forces FindLatestByWindowScope — the production session-rotation survival path, previously untested), M3 accepted (dispatch-ahead-of-registration race prevented by greeting-gated protocol). Also: stray 17MB plugins/codex/codex build artifact deleted; flaky concurrent-scratch golden papercut'd (load-sensitive, passed 2/3 full runs + isolation). Next: Phase D+E inline on fable (watch subcommand + placement rule + guard message + #78782 push).
